demographics.living_situation: lives at home; an adult child is present this evening

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My head feels like it's in a vice, the blood pressure machine says 200 over 110, and my legs have turned to jelly so I can't even stand up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The headache and the very high home blood-pressure reading came on suddenly today, and tonight my legs got so weak I can't get out of the chair.

symptom_narrative.onset: the headache and the blood-pressure spike came on suddenly earlier today; the leg weakness has built up and got much worse tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: hours for the worst of it, on a background of feeling generally weak and tired for a few weeks
symptom_narrative.character: a pounding, dull headache that feels like a vice squeezing my head, with heavy, floppy legs that won't hold me up and painful cramps and spasms in my calves
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I've felt — I genuinely cannot stand
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and getting worse through the evening
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to stand or put weight on my legs
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: over the last few weeks I've been passing a lot of urine and getting up several times at night to go, and my muscles have felt weak and crampy
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: my blood pressure has been hard to control for a long time but I've never had my legs give out like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: cannot bear weight or walk; stuck in the chair and need help to move

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high blood pressure that has been very hard to control — I need three different tablets for it

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home this evening with an adult child present who is helping make the call

objective_data_offered.timing: just now, on the home automatic blood-pressure machine
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an unverified home automatic cuff

objective_data_offered.value: adult child reports the patient cannot stand or bear weight on either leg and is holding both temples because of the headache
